sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Chain Bridge Bancorp, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter 2024 and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
feed.summary: Chain Bridge Bancorp, Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2024, reporting consolidated net income of $3.7 million and $20.9 million, respectively. The company's initial public offering in October 2024, the first by a U.S. banking institution in over two years, provided $36.5 million in net proceeds. The results highlight significant increases in net interest income and a strategic focus on liquidity, asset quality, and financial strength, despite seasonal deposit outflows from political organizations post-election.

feed.title: Lbp Am Sa Cuts Stock Holdings in Medtronic PLC $MDT
feed.summary: Lbp Am Sa reduced its stake in Medtronic PLC (NYSE:MDT) by 69.4% in the third quarter, selling 36,546 shares and now owning 16,080 shares valued at $1,531,000. Despite this, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc., Geode Capital Management LLC, and Bank of New York Mellon Corp increased their holdings. Medtronic recently reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.71 per share.

feed.title: Seagate surge tops S&P 50, amid strong guidance; analysts praise results (STX:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Seagate Technology shares surged nearly 10% after reporting stronger-than-expected results and issuing guidance that significantly exceeded forecasts. Analysts praised the company's performance, highlighting its strong position with HAMR technology and potential benefits from AI-driven demand. Seagate's market performance topped the S&P 500 index following the positive news.

feed.title: Dollar Tree's $1.50 household buy to snap up before the clocks change
feed.summary: Dollar Tree is selling packs of AAA batteries for $1.50, aligning with the "Change Your Clocks, Change Your Batteries" campaign for daylight saving time. The article also highlights a new "penny policy" at Dollar Tree, allowing shoppers to purchase certain items for as little as one cent if they can locate them and confirm the price using the store's mobile app. This policy reportedly allows savvy customers to snag significant deals on marked-down or misplaced inventory.

feed.title: Roche Makes Obesity Splash, Moderna Cans Vaccine Trials, Sarepta’s New Data, More
feed.summary: Roche announced positive Phase II results for its obesity candidate CT-388, which achieved 22.5% weight loss, comparable to Eli Lilly's Zepbound. Meanwhile, Moderna halted late-stage vaccine trials for infectious diseases, citing challenges from Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy's anti-vaccine policies. Sarepta also released new data for its Duchenne muscular dystrophy gene therapy, Elevidys.

feed.title: Textron shares slide premarket after soft 2026 profit outlook (TXT:NYSE)
feed.summary: Textron shares experienced a premarket slide of about 4% after the company's 2026 profit outlook fell short of Wall Street expectations. While the industrial conglomerate reported a beat on fourth-quarter earnings and revenue, investor sentiment was negatively impacted by the lower-than-anticipated 2026 guidance for adjusted earnings of $6.40 to $6.60. Weakness was particularly noted in the Bell, Industrial, and eAviation segments.

feed.title: 6 Beauty Buys At Dollar Tree That Are Shockingly Good
feed.summary: This article highlights six surprisingly effective beauty products available at Dollar Tree, despite the recent price increase to $1.25. The author, Symiah Dorsey, shares personal recommendations, comparing these budget-friendly finds to higher-end brand dupes in categories like leave-in conditioner, lip masks, skincare, anti-chafe cream, cocoa butter jelly stick, and face wash. She emphasizes their affordability and quality, making them smart alternatives for cost-conscious consumers.

feed.title: Salesforce Inc. (NYSE: CRM) Price Prediction and Forecast 2026–2030 (February 2026)
feed.summary: This article provides a price prediction and forecast for Salesforce Inc. (NYSE: CRM) from 2026 to 2030, highlighting key growth drivers such as untapped international markets, AI solutions, and quantum technology investments. Despite recent stock fluctuations and competition, the company's strong financial health, brand recognition, and R&D efforts are expected to drive future growth. Analysts give Salesforce a "Moderate Buy" rating, with a projected year-end 2026 price target of $333.90 and a 2030 forecast of $493.80.

feed.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Price Target Lowered by $15, 'Overweight' Rating Maintained
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Shahriar Pourreza lowered the price target for Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) from $478 to $460 but maintained an 'Overweight' rating, indicating a potential 59% upside. The company, a major clean energy producer and nuclear operator, is seen as a key player in the AI boom despite a recent setback from an agreement addressing escalating electricity prices. The stock previously performed well in 2025, but the article suggests other AI stocks might offer greater upside with less risk.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Corporation (LMT) Secures Multimillion Defense Contracts Strengthening Pipeline
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) has secured multiple multimillion-dollar defense contracts, strengthening its pipeline. These contracts include a $9.58 million modification for combat systems integration and testing, and two additional contracts totaling $225 million for PAC-3 missile services and Aegis systems support. The deals highlight Lockheed Martin's continued role in aerospace and defense, securing work for its Rotary and Mission Systems division.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands: Historical Overview and Future Outlook
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands has transitioned from a Las Vegas-centric hospitality company to one primarily focused on Asian markets, particularly Macau and Singapore, after selling its Las Vegas properties in 2021. Despite this strategic shift, the company maintains its headquarters in Las Vegas, and its upcoming earnings report is highly anticipated for insights into its future direction. Wall Street analysts generally forecast a rise in LVS stock price over the next year, with an average target of $69.12, reflecting a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Delta Airlines Settles on GE Aerospace (GE) GEnx Engines amid Tests on Hypersonic Missiles
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines has chosen GE Aerospace's GEnx engines to power its 30 new Boeing 787-10 aircraft, including spare engines and long-term service support. This contract follows GE Aerospace's successful engine tests with Lockheed Martin for hypersonic missiles, indicating the company's strong position in aerospace propulsion technology. The GEnx engine, with over 70 million g-hours of operation since 2011, powers nearly two-thirds of all 787 aircraft.

feed.title: Texas Instruments, ASML Lift Chip Stocks Higher
feed.summary: Semiconductor stocks rose recently, driven by strong quarterly results from ASML Holding NV and an optimistic near-term outlook from Texas Instruments Inc. ASML reported better-than-expected revenue and announced a 12 billion euro share buyback plan, while Texas Instruments' forecast for the first quarter offset a slight miss in its fourth-quarter results. Broader chip sentiment was further boosted by developments in AI, including China's approval of Nvidia's H200 chips and SoftBank's potential investment in OpenAI.

feed.title: MSCI ($MSCI) Releases Q4 2025 Earnings
feed.summary: MSCI ($MSCI) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with results showing earnings per share of $4.66, which met estimates, and revenue of $822,530,000, missing analyst estimates. The article also details recent insider trading activity, hedge fund movements, government contracts awarded to MSCI, and recent analyst ratings and price targets for the stock.

feed.title: LENNOX INTERNATIONAL ($LII) Releases Q4 2025 Earnings
feed.summary: LENNOX INTERNATIONAL ($LII) reported Q4 2025 earnings of $4.45 per share, missing estimates, and revenue of $1.195 billion, also below expectations. Insider trading activity for LII in the past six months shows significant selling, with no purchases. Institutional investors displayed mixed activity, with substantial reductions by some firms and additions by others.

feed.title: 11 Materials Stocks Moving In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: This article provides a list of 11 materials stocks experiencing significant movement in Wednesday's pre-market session. It highlights several gainers, including New Found Gold and TRX Gold, and losers such as 5E Advanced Materials and CN Energy Group, citing their respective stock price changes and market capitalizations.

feed.title: General Dynamics earnings beat by $0.06, revenue topped estimates
feed.summary: General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) reported strong fourth-quarter results, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $4.17 against a predicted $4.11. The company also surpassed revenue expectations, reaching $14.38 billion compared to the consensus of $13.78 billion. General Dynamics' stock has shown good performance, rising 6.30% in the last three months and 45.80% over the last year.

feed.title: At Uber trial, expert says riders reported rape every day in 2024
feed.summary: During a federal trial in Phoenix, an expert witness testified that Uber's internal data showed 365 rapes were reported on its platform in 2024. The testimony highlighted Uber's algorithm, S-RAD, which is designed to predict sexual assault risk, and critiqued the company's defense that sexual assaults are statistically rare. The expert asserted that Uber deliberately limited the intervention of its safety system, prioritizing business operations over maximizing safety.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Q4 Earnings: Revenue Misses, EPS In-Line
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) reported Q4 earnings per share of $1.03, meeting market expectations, but missed revenue projections by $70 million despite a 3.3% year-over-year increase. The company forecasts full-year net sales between $15.0 and $15.3 billion, with organic sales growth in the low to mid-single digits. While Otis demonstrates solid operational efficiency and financial stability, its valuation metrics present a mixed picture with a P/E ratio close to its 3-year high, and high leverage poses a risk.

feed.title: Corning Announces Outstanding 2025 Financial Results (1) – Upgrades Springboard Plan for Faster Sales Growth on Significantly Enhanced Financial Profile
feed.summary: Corning Incorporated reported outstanding financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, exceeding previous guidance with significant growth in core sales and EPS. The company also announced an upgraded Springboard plan, projecting an additional $11 billion in incremental annualized sales by the end of 2028, up from the original $8 billion target. This positive outlook is supported by an enhanced financial profile, including expanded operating margins and nearly doubled adjusted free cash flow since the Springboard plan's inception.

feed.title: General Dynamics Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: General Dynamics reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results with net earnings of $1.1 billion and $4.2 billion, respectively. Revenue for the full year reached $52.6 billion, an increase of 10.1% from 2024. The company also demonstrated a robust cash flow from operating activities, significant capital investments, and ended the year with a substantial backlog of $118 billion, reflecting strong demand across all segments.

feed.title: 8 major sponsors join Philadelphia’s FIFA World Cup lineup
feed.summary: Philadelphia has secured eight major sponsors for its FIFA World Cup 2026 lineup, with each organization committing a minimum of $5 million. These sponsorships, though varying in terms, are crucial for the city's role as a host for six World Cup games. The announcement comes as Philadelphia prepares for substantial tourism and economic activity surrounding the event.

feed.title: Bank of America to match $1,000 government deposits for Trump accounts
feed.summary: Bank of America announced it will match the government's $1,000 contribution to the newly established "Trump accounts" for eligible employees with children born between January 1, 2025, and December 31, 2028. Additionally, the bank will allow employees with children under 18 to make pretax contributions through payroll deductions. These accounts, part of the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, are designed to provide newborns with a government-backed savings program, with funds invested in broad U.S. stock index funds.

feed.title: Tripadvisor Trendcast 2026 Introduces The Year of Meaningful Travel Experiences
feed.summary: Tripadvisor's 2026 Trendcast report, based on over a billion reviews and contributions, reveals a significant shift towards "meaningful travel experiences." Key trends include a surge in pet-friendly travel and extreme adventure bookings, indicating travelers are prioritizing activities and connections over just visiting destinations. The report highlights "Sweat Jetting," "Extreme and on the Edge," "It's a Kid's World," "Soft Clubbing," and "VIP Tourism" as top trends reshaping how trips are planned.

feed.title: Cambiar Investors LLC Has $8.38 Million Stock Position in BorgWarner Inc. $BWA
feed.summary: Cambiar Investors LLC significantly reduced its stake in BorgWarner Inc. by 36.1% in Q3, selling over 107,000 shares to now hold 190,542 shares valued at $8.38 million. Despite this, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $47.31, following strong Q3 earnings and upward revisions to price targets by some brokers. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend and insiders have been net sellers over the last three months.

feed.title: Chipotle Announces New Menu
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is bringing back its popular Chicken al Pastor dish to its menu for a limited time, starting February 10. The dish, described as grilled chicken marinated with morita peppers, achiote, pineapple, lime, and cilantro, was a global innovation and highly requested by customers. Chipotle plans to increase its new limited-time menu offerings, as these items have shown to drive increased customer spending and engagement.

feed.title: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on PayPal Holdings Stock?
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) has underperformed the broader market, with its stock down 38.5% over the past 52 weeks and 4.9% year-to-date, despite a recent 3.9% rise following strong Q3 2025 results and a new partnership with OpenAI. Analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating on PYPL, with the mean price target of $72.72 suggesting a 31% premium, though this sentiment is less bullish than three months ago. The company's adjusted EPS is expected to grow by 15.3% year-over-year for the current fiscal year.

feed.title: Bear Poop Beer from Columbia Sportswear and Breakside Brewing
feed.summary: Columbia Sportswear has partnered with Breakside Brewery to release "Nature Calls," a unique craft lager brewed with water infused with a hint of bear poop collected in Montana. This unconventional beer is part of Columbia's 'Engineered for Whatever' platform, aiming to give sports fans a literal taste of the outdoors. The beer will be available in limited quantities at Columbia's booth during The Players Tailgate in Santa Clara and at Breakside Brewery locations, and is confirmed to be 100% safe to drink.

feed.title: Textron reports in-line Q4 results, guides 2026 below expectations By Investing.com
feed.summary: Textron Inc. reported adjusted earnings for Q4 2025 that met Wall Street expectations and revenue that exceeded estimates, driven by a rebound from a prior year's strike. Despite strong performance in its aviation and helicopter divisions, shares slipped 1.8% as the company's 2026 earnings guidance fell below analyst forecasts. The aerospace and defense company anticipates adjusted earnings of $6.40 to $6.60 per share on approximately $15.5 billion in revenue for fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: MSCI Reports Financial Results for Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. announced strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with double-digit growth in operating revenues and adjusted EPS. The company saw significant increases across its Index, Analytics, Sustainability and Climate, and Private Assets segments, driven by recurring subscriptions and asset-based fees. MSCI anticipates continued growth in 2026, supported by strategic initiatives and a focus on AI integration.

feed.title: Rakuten Investment Management Inc. Acquires Shares of 793,191 Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Rakuten Investment Management Inc. has acquired a new position in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG), purchasing 793,191 shares valued at approximately $193.5 million. This stake now makes Alphabet 0.6% of Rakuten's total holdings. Other institutional investors have also modified their positions in Alphabet, with varying degrees of increases to their stakes.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOG Shares Sold by Osborne Partners Capital Management LLC
feed.summary: Osborne Partners Capital Management LLC reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 3.9% in the third quarter, selling 5,681 shares and holding 139,540 shares valued at $33.99 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their Alphabet holdings, with some increasing their positions and others initiating new ones. The article also provides a news roundup for Alphabet, insider trading details, analysts' price targets, stock performance, and dividend information.

feed.title: Dover Corporation $DOV Shares Acquired by Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp significantly increased its holdings in Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) by 32.3% in the third quarter, now owning 89,081 shares valued at approximately $14.86 million. Dover maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with an average price target of $218.45, backed by recent upward revisions. The company also pays a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share, yielding about 1.0%, and has a market capitalization nearing $28.43 billion.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust $CPT Shares Sold by Teacher Retirement System of Texas
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas decreased its stake in Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) by 26.5% during the third quarter, selling 15,595 shares to hold 43,346 shares valued at $4.628 million. Despite this, other institutional investors like Norges Bank, Long Pond Capital LP, Invesco Ltd., Jennison Associates LLC, and First Trust Advisors LP significantly increased their positions in the real estate investment trust. Recent insider transactions include sales by CEO Richard J. Campo and Director Heather J. Brunner, while analysts have issued mixed ratings on the stock, with a consensus "Hold" and an average target price of $117.34.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Has $16.04 Million Stock Holdings in APA Corporation $APA
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp increased its stake in APA Corporation by 27.1%, now holding 660,730 shares valued at approximately $16.04 million. APA Corporation beat its latest earnings estimates with $0.93 EPS and reported $2.12 billion in revenue, prompting a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with a $26.35 price target. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share, yielding 3.9%, and has institutional investors owning 83.01% of its stock.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Cuts Holdings in Allegion PLC $ALLE
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp significantly reduced its stake in Allegion PLC (NYSE:ALLE) by 33.3% during the third quarter, selling 37,250 shares and retaining 74,639 shares valued at approximately $13.24 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in Allegion, which currently trades near $166.91 with a market capitalization of $14.36 billion. Analysts generally rate the stock as "Hold" with an average price target of $174.25, and the company offers a quarterly dividend of $0.51 per share.

feed.title: Teradyne, Inc. $TER Position Lowered by Resona Asset Management Co. Ltd.
feed.summary: Resona Asset Management Co. Ltd. reduced its stake in Teradyne, Inc. by 9.2% in the third quarter, now holding 50,631 shares valued at $6.94 million. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own a significant 99.77% of the company's stock. Teradyne recently declared a quarterly dividend and analysts maintain a largely positive outlook due to increasing demand in AI and robotics, with several "Buy" ratings and an average price target of $205.75.

feed.title: STERIS plc $STE Shares Acquired by Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp increased its stake in STERIS plc by 27.3% in Q3, acquiring an additional 11,543 shares to hold a total of 53,857 shares valued at $13.33 million. The medical equipment provider reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations with $2.47 EPS and $1.46 billion in revenue, and set a positive FY2026 EPS guidance. Despite insider sales totaling $6.59 million, institutional ownership remains high at 94.69%, and the stock holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a $273.50 target price.

feed.title: WeRide launches GENESIS simulation platform to accelerate global autonomous driving development
feed.summary: Autonomous driving company WeRide has launched GENESIS, a new simulation platform that uses a blend of physical and generative AI to accelerate the development and commercialization of autonomous driving systems. GENESIS is designed to replicate complex urban environments and rare scenarios, significantly reducing the need for extensive on-road testing. The platform features a closed-loop architecture with four core AI modules for scenario generation, agent behavior modeling, performance evaluation, and automated diagnosis, aiming to refine autonomous driving algorithms continuously.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Acquires 93,831 Shares of Las Vegas Sands Corp. $LVS
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp increased its stake in Las Vegas Sands Corp. (NYSE:LVS) by 61.1%, acquiring 93,831 shares to now own 247,500 shares valued at approximately $13.31 million. Despite this institutional accumulation, there has been significant insider selling, with COO Patrick Dumont and EVP D. Zachary Hudson offloading shares totaling over $21 million. Analysts generally maintain a positive outlook, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $69.12.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Sells 41,213 Shares of Loews Corporation $L
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp has decreased its stake in Loews Corporation by 23.9%, selling 41,213 shares in the third quarter and now owning 131,579 shares valued at approximately $13.21 million. Insider sales have totaled 125,770 shares worth $13.33 million over the past 90 days, with insiders currently holding 18.7% of the company. Loews, an insurance provider with a $21.13 billion market capitalization, recently reported Q3 EPS of $2.43 on $4.67 billion in revenue and pays a small annualized dividend.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Wobbles as UK Targets Google’s AI Overviews, Search Dominance
feed.summary: Alphabet's stock experienced a slight wobble after the UK's Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) proposed new measures targeting Google's AI Overviews, online content usage, and search result ranking, following a similar investigation by the EU. The proposed curbs aim to ensure fair treatment for content producers and transparency in search rankings, along with offering users more choice in search engines and easier access to their data. Despite these regulatory pressures, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" consensus rating for Alphabet, with an average price target implying about 4% upside potential.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley upgrades Johnson & Johnson, sees upside on robust drug pipeline
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has upgraded Johnson & Johnson to an overweight rating, increasing its price target to $262 due to a robust drug pipeline and strong earnings potential. Analyst Terence Flynn highlights the company's favorable revenue and EPS growth projections, anticipating significant contributions from new products that are expected to offset patent expirations. This upgrade comes as Johnson & Johnson shares have performed well, reflecting positive analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Elevance Health: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Elevance Health Inc. reported Q4 earnings of $547 million, or $2.47 per share, with adjusted earnings of $3.33 per share, surpassing analyst expectations. The health insurer posted revenue of $49.75 billion, though its adjusted revenue of $49.31 billion missed Street forecasts. For the full year, the company had a profit of $5.66 billion on revenue of $197.58 billion and expects full-year earnings of $25.50 per share.

feed.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp Sells 170,196 Shares of Edison International $EIX
feed.summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Trust & Banking Corp has reduced its stake in Edison International by 41.5% in Q3, selling 170,196 shares but still holding 239,610 shares valued at approximately $13.25 million. Edison International exceeded quarterly expectations with EPS of $2.34 and revenue of $5.75 billion, also raising its quarterly dividend to $0.8775. The company's stock has seen modifications in holdings by several institutional investors, and analysts have issued varied ratings with a consensus target price of $63.70.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines orders 31 widebody Airbus jets to increase its international capacity (DAL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines has placed a firm order for 31 widebody Airbus jets, including 16 A330-900s and 15 A350-900s, to enhance its international capacity. The agreement with Airbus also allows for an option to purchase up to 20 additional widebody aircraft. This move aims to expand Delta's global reach and strengthen its fleet for long-haul routes.

feed.title: Teacher Retirement System of Texas Trims Stock Position in VICI Properties Inc. $VICI
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas reduced its stake in VICI Properties Inc. by 27.1% during the third quarter, selling over 51,000 shares. Despite this trim, other major institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc., State Street Corp, Geode Capital Management LLC, and Allianz Asset Management GmbH increased their positions in the real estate investment trust (REIT). VICI Properties reported strong third-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, yielding 6.3%.

feed.title: Teacher Retirement System of Texas Boosts Stake in Delta Air Lines, Inc. $DAL
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas significantly increased its stake in Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) by 204.7% in Q3, now holding 75,493 shares valued at approximately $4.28 million. Despite this institutional confidence, company insiders sold over 350,000 shares totaling $24.74 million in the last quarter, reducing their overall ownership to 0.96%. Analysts maintain a consensus "Buy" rating for Delta with an average target price of $80.47, following the company's Q4 EPS beat and positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Teacher Retirement System of Texas Buys 29,221 Shares of Las Vegas Sands Corp. $LVS
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas increased its holdings in Las Vegas Sands Corp. (NYSE:LVS) by 54.4% in the third quarter, purchasing an additional 29,221 shares and bringing its total ownership to 82,921 shares valued at $4.46 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their stakes in LVS. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $69.12, although company insiders have recently sold over 4 million shares.

feed.title: Teacher Retirement System of Texas Has $3.84 Million Position in Invitation Home $INVH
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas increased its holdings in Invitation Home (NYSE:INVH) by 48.1% in the third quarter, bringing its total position to $3.84 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their stakes in the company, which currently has a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $34.70 from analysts. Invitation Home recently announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.30 per share.
